security.csp: default-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://github.com

bundle.shortDescription: Manage Xenia Xbox 360 emulator installations, game libraries, patches, profiles, and saves on Linux
bundle.longDescription: Xenia Manager for Linux is a native desktop application for managing the Xenia Xbox 360 emulator on Linux. It handles emulator installation and updates, game library scanning and organization, patch and profile management, save portability, and launch configuration — all from a single AppImage.
